SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: ALTERNATIVE HEALTH THERAPY USING JOHREI METHODS - PROVIDE SEMINARS TEACHING THE TECHNIQUES OF ENERGY HEALING OR SPIRITUAL SCIENCE BASED ON RESEARCH AND EXPERIMENTAL PROOF.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description2Txt: RESEARCH OF NATURAL FARMING METHODS - RESEARCH AND EXPERIMENT OF SOME AGRICULTURAL METHOADS THAT RESPECT SOIL AND ENHANCE ITS POWER. ENCOURAGE THE MEMBERS AND ASSOCIATES TO START AND MAINTAIN HOME GARDENS AS A THERAPY TO HELP INDIVIDUALS ATTAIN A BETTER STATE OF HEALTH THROUGH INCREASED CONTACT WITH NATURE.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description3Txt: ART AND CULTURE - ENHANCE THE SPIRITUAL SENTIMENTS OF HUMAN BEING WITH ART AND CULTURE SUCH AS ART CONTEST FOR KIDS, FLOWER ARRANGING, AND TEA CEREMONY.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description4Txt: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS WITH MINISTRIES AND UNIVERSITIES - PROVIDE EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS SUCH AS SPIRITUAL ENERGY, THE BEAUTY OF NATURE, OR LIFE-SUSTAINING ENERGY WITH MINISTRIES AND UNIVERSITIES.

RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: ALL OF THE ACTIVITIES LISTED IN PART XVI-A, COLUMN (E), ARE RELATED TO THE DIRECT CHARITABLE ACTIVITIES OF THE FOUNDATION.
